From messy data processes to reporting that just works.

Most teams know the numbers they need, but spend too much time chasing spreadsheets, cleaning exports, and rebuilding the same reports. CEV Analytics turns that process into a streamlined reporting system.

01

Data Process Review

Find where data is scattered, duplicated, manually rebuilt, or slowing down better decisions.

02

Custom Dashboards

Design clean, executive-ready dashboards around your exact KPIs, workflow, and audience.

03

Automated Reporting

Connect recurring sources and automate refreshes so reports are ready when your team needs them.

04

Simple Access

Give teams advanced reporting tools without forcing them to dig through raw files or rebuild reports by hand.

Built for SMB teams that need better reporting without enterprise complexity.

CEV Analytics is built for small to medium-sized businesses that have outgrown messy spreadsheets, disconnected exports, and reporting processes that take too much time to maintain.

Every dashboard is completely custom and built to be automated from the start. The result is an easier path to advanced reporting: fewer manual steps, cleaner metrics, and tools your team can access every day.

1

Diagnose

Map current spreadsheets, systems, exports, and manual reporting steps.

2

Build

Create custom dashboards and reporting tools around the questions your business actually asks.

3

Automate

Replace recurring manual updates with refreshable workflows and easy access to reliable reports.
